span.t-att-class: 'badge badge-success' if document.state=='confirm' else '' 'badge badge-primary' if document.state=='expiry' else '' 'badge badge-danger' if document.state=='renew' else '' 'badge badge-warning' if document.state=='refuse' else '' 'badge badge-light' if document.state=='draft' else '' 'badge badge-info' if document.state=='issue' else ''

span.t-esc: user_id.employee_id.name[:23] + '...' if user_id.name and len(user_id.employee_id.name) > 25 else user_id.employee_id.name
